description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 2, 2026 at 12:46 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a bus on Portola Drive near Teresita Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northeast on Portola Drive in the fourth from the right lane in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection with O’Shaughnessy Boulevard. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a bus traveling northbound on Teresita Boulevard turned 
right onto Portola Drive behind the Waymo AV, and began to enter the beginning of the dedicated left turn lane adjacent to the Waymo AV. 
The Waymo AV began to move a short distance to create additional room for the bus to complete its right turn before coming to a stop. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, the bus continued to complete the right turn and the right side of the bus made contact with the rear left 
side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The 
Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
